tool: Qodo Gen VS Code plugin -- Review uncommitted changes
scope: diff vs pinned SHA on branch eval-uncommitted

findings.title: Hardcoded OPENAI_API_KEY default leaks credential-shaped secret and can be used unintentionally
findings.description: DEFAULT_OPENAI_API_KEY is a literal sk-... string and is used as a fallback when OPENAI_API_KEY is unset, which can accidentally route requests using a baked-in key-like value.

findings.title: Command injection via os.system in _open_url_in_browser()
findings.description: _open_url_in_browser() interpolates url directly into os.system() without quoting/validation; shell metacharacters execute arbitrary commands.

findings.title: Path traversal in FileSystem.read_named_file() allows sandbox escape
findings.description: read_named_file() joins self.base_dir / name and opens it directly; .. segments or absolute paths read arbitrary host files outside intended base directory.

findings.title: Predictable device_id generation weakens sync auth identity
findings.description: get_or_create_device_id() switches from uuid7str() to random.choices(...), not cryptographically secure; enables device-id spoofing.

findings.title: Non-constant-time token comparison enables timing attacks
findings.description: _check_token() uses == for secret comparison; short-circuits and leaks information via timing differences when used on auth/webhook paths.

findings.title: Off-by-one history truncation drops valid items and shortens window
findings.description: Changing <= to < and reducing recent_items_count by an extra 1 causes the history view to omit an item when total_items == max_history_items and shows fewer recent items than intended.

findings.title: ModelProviderError is silently swallowed when non-retryable or retries exhausted
findings.description: Retry logic now catches ModelProviderError but no longer re-raises when not retrying; callers may get None/unexpected behavior instead of an exception.

findings.title: _detect_sensitive_key_name can crash when sensitive_data is None and mis-attribute falsy values
findings.description: Removing the early guard means sensitive_data.items() raises AttributeError when sensitive_data is None; removed if value checks let empty/None values match unexpectedly.

findings.title: File descriptor leak in get_browser_use_version() due to missing context manager
findings.description: Opening pyproject.toml without with leaks the file handle on success and failure paths.

findings.title: Connection lock is skipped by default, reintroducing concurrent connect race
findings.description: _skip_connection_lock defaults to True; real _connection_lock replaced with nullcontext(); concurrent start() calls race into _cdp_client_root is None and connect twice.
